---
title: "Lab 10 — IV Thinking with AI"
---

# Lab 10 — IV Thinking with AI

**Read first:** Chapter 24 (AI as Research Companion — IV).

{{< include ../../assignments/assignment_10.qmd >}}

## AI and me

1. How did AI **support** you in this lab?
2. How did AI **fail** you?
3. How did AI **extend** you?
